challenge.title: Korak 8
challenge.description:
Sledeći korak je kreiranje stanja koje će proveriti da li value cilj je u sredini.

Unutar petlje while, proverava se da li if proveri da li je value jednak value_at_middle. Ako jeste, vratite vrednost promene za path_to_target.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)

tests.text: Treba da napraviš if izraz koji proverava da li je value jednako value_at_middle.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_function("binary_search").find_whiles()[0].find_body().find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("value == value_at_middle") or _cond.is_equivalent("value_at_middle == value")
`) })

tests.text: Trebalo bi da vratiš izmene path_to_target unutar izraza if.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)
        
        if value == value_at_middle:
          return path_to_target, f"Value found at index {mid}"
        elif value > value_at_middle:
            low = mid + 1
        else:
            high = mid - 1
    
    return [], "Value not found"

print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3))
print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], 4)) 
print(binary_search([1, 3, 5, 9, 14, 22], 10))
